notes: CodificationSection, , , provided for reimbursement for official travel performed by employees of the Bureau of Old-Age Insurance, was from the Federal Security Agency Appropriation Act, 1941, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriations acts.act June 26, 1940, ch. 428, title II54 Stat. 588
